nasb.text: and they all ate and were satisfied. They picked up what was left over of the broken pieces, twelve full baskets.

esv.text: And they all ate and were satisfied. And they took up twelve baskets full of the broken pieces left over.

cnv.text: 大家都吃了，並且吃飽了，他們把剩下的零碎拾起來，裝滿了十二個籃子。

ccb.text: 大家都吃饱了，把剩下的零碎收拾起来，竟装满了十二个篮子。

csbs.text: 大家都吃了，并且吃饱了。他们把剩下的碎块收拾起来，装满了十二个篮子。
